title: Find Edges In Shortest Paths
description: Return for every undirected edge whether it lies on any shortest path from node 0 to node n-1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, edges: list[list[int]]. 2 <= n <= 50000; 1 <= len(edges) <= 50000; 0-indexed endpoints; positive weights <= 100000; no repeated edge.
output_contract: Return boolean[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
